Special Effect Flags

Mini-bossNo
Rare modeRare flags presentThe record exposes rare-family flags, but the client cache does not mark it as alwaysRare.
Effect poolAttacker, Defender, Legend, Speeder, Unique
Loot source modelSpawner-linked loot

Enabled rare families: Attacker - The name suggests an offense-oriented rare roll. The client cache does not expose the exact damage or refire multiplier. | Defender - The name suggests a survivability-oriented rare roll. The client cache does not expose the exact HP, shield, armor, or resistance multiplier. | Legend - A distinct rare family used by high-tier named enemies. The client cache exposes the flag but not the exact stat formula behind it. | Speeder - The name suggests a movement-focused rare roll. The client cache does not expose the exact speed or chase-range multiplier. | Unique - A distinct rare family used by a smaller set of named enemies. The client cache does not expose a separate global loot rule for it.

Open enemy effects guide

Equipment

  • Ship sprite/base stats: Enemy Nexar Blade Enemy Nexar Blade
  • Engine: Enemy Nexar Blade
  • Loot: Big Metal Scrap, Fusion Core, Artifact 30% (100% artifact chance)
  • Weapon: Enemy Nexar Blade range 0-150
